subject: fix(pwa): add explicit "Check for updates" to burger menu
body:
The "Refresh" button only reloaded the page, which doesn't reliably
trigger SW update detection due to race conditions between register()
and the updatefound listener setup. Added a dedicated "Check for
updates" menu item that explicitly calls registration.update() with
a 1.5s settle delay for the SW lifecycle, then reports the result
via toast. The update strip in _layout.tsx still shows automatically
when an update is found.

Tags: pwa, ux, bug-fix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-updates
Semver: patch

title: add explicit "Check for updates" to burger menu
